channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

1. Gennaro Filice 2026 NFL mock draft 2.0: Cowboys and Chiefs shake up top 10 with two trades  NFL.com
  2. Chiefs, Jets among a number of squads with multiple firsts that must ace 2026 NFL Draft  CBS Sports
  3. NFL mock draft roundup: Experts predict first round before draft  USA Today
  4. 2026 NFL draft: Top prospects at 100 different skills, traits  ESPN
  5. 2026 NFL Draft consensus rankings: Arvell Reese moves back into No. 1 spot  The New York Times

item.title: Former Cardinals head coach, Titans assistant McGinnis dies - ESPN
item.description:
1. Former Cardinals head coach, Titans assistant McGinnis dies  ESPN
  2. Longtime NFL Coach, Titans Color Analyst Dave McGinnis Passes Away at Age 74  Tennessee Titans
  3. Dave McGinnis, the former Chicago Bears assistant wrongly announced as head coach in 1999, dies at 74  Chicago Tribune
  4. Former Arizona Cardinals head coach dead at 74  The Arizona Republic
  5. Former Cardinals head coach, longtime NFL assistant Dave McGinnis dies at 74  USA Today

item.title: The war in Iran hits home as housing rebound stalls - Politico
item.description:
1. The war in Iran hits home as housing rebound stalls  Politico
  2. The Iran war is making life more expensive for Americans | CNN Business  CNN
  3. Iran war upends spring housing market. Here's what real estate agents are seeing  CNBC
  4. Mortgage Rates are Going the Wrong Way. These Stocks Are Feeling It.  The Motley Fool
  5. Making Cents | Should I buy a house right now?  KCRA
